summary: v1.18.1 shipped to live. SEO index tracker improvements, cheat sheet cross-links, email campaigns batch slider, DB indexes, and bug fixes.
scope: SWF workspace — admin/seo.astro, api/seo-index.ts, cheat-sheets, email-campaigns, Layout.astro, 35 corrupted blog files, package.json, migrations
features_shipped: Cheat sheet cross-links (SOWPODS <-> TWL icon nav bar)
SEO Index: Sync Links button (re-scans all pages for link counts)
SEO Index: Sync to Pages reworked (incremental, logs diffs, char counters)
SEO Index: Crawled column now sortable
SEO Index: Search prioritises shorter URL matches
SEO Index: maxlength removed from edit fields (counters turn red instead)
SEO Sync Log: full values without truncation + char limit badges per field
Email campaigns: 3-position batch slider (not started / scheduled / finished) with batch_status DB table
Welcome banner: complete border with rounded corners
Bug fix: 35 corrupted description files from seo-write-to-pages.cjs
issues_encountered: seo-write-to-pages.cjs corrupted 35+ blog files by writing concatenated descriptions — removed from prebuild, script needs safety validation before re-enabling
Cloudflare deploy auth token expired mid-upload for large asset sets (882 files) — required wrangler login refresh
Vite dep cache corruption after wrangler update to latest — required rm -rf node_modules/.vite .astro
Remote D1 connection drops frequently in dev mode (--remote flag) — requires dev server restart
pending_next_session: Add telemetry panel to admin site-status page (endpoint health table: Homepage, Blog, Guide, Activities, Chat with status, response time, health)
Add 'Site Live Sessions' panel to admin site-status (active users count, unique pages, session table with UID/Page/Trail/IP/Location/Last Seen)
Two-worker split architecture discussed but deferred (main site worker vs blog-only worker for /blog/*) — would reduce deploy from 5min to seconds
seo-write-to-pages.cjs needs safety fixes (validate no quotes/HTML entities in values) before re-enabling in prebuild
Uncommitted changes need git push (35 blog fixes, migration 0054, email-campaigns slider, post-deploy SEO sync improvements)

git_state.last_push_commit: 34322c3 — v1.18.1: cheat sheet cross-links, SEO sync improvements, welcome banner fix
git_state.uncommitted_includes: 35 blog description fixes, migration 0054, email-campaigns batch slider, seo-write-to-pages.cjs, batch_status table, wrangler update
